title: Method Level 2B — Expansion
summary: Steps and skips in D, G, and A minor positions — more varied rhythms and longer melodies, all using written-in accidentals.

exercises.title: D Steps and Skips
exercises.summary: Right hand alternates stepwise motion with skips in D position.
exercises.goal: Distinguish between steps (adjacent notes) and skips (one note apart) in D position.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: D Position Song
exercises.summary: Five-measure melodic piece in D position mixing quarters and halves.
exercises.goal: Play a flowing D-position melody with F-sharp written as an accidental.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: D Waltz
exercises.summary: Six-measure waltz exploring the full D five-finger position.
exercises.goal: Play a D-position waltz with a clear three-beat lift.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: D March
exercises.summary: Six-measure D-position march in 2/4 time.
exercises.goal: Play crisp two-beat patterns in D position at a march tempo.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: G Steps and Skips
exercises.summary: Right hand alternates steps and skips in G position, reaching up to D5.
exercises.goal: Distinguish steps and skips in G position, including the leap to D5.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: G Position Song
exercises.summary: Five-measure melodic piece in G position mixing quarters and halves.
exercises.goal: Shape a flowing G-position melody with direction and resolution.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: G Waltz
exercises.summary: Six-measure waltz in G position.
exercises.goal: Sustain a lilting three-beat waltz character across G position.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: G March
exercises.summary: Six-measure G-position march in 2/4.
exercises.goal: Play clean two-beat figures in G position at a march tempo.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: A Minor Skips
exercises.summary: Right hand explores thirds and skips within the A minor five-finger position.
exercises.goal: Play thirds (A–C, B–D, C–E) confidently in A minor.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: A Minor Waltz
exercises.summary: Six-measure A minor waltz with a dark, expressive character.
exercises.goal: Feel the three-beat waltz pulse in a minor key.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: D Bass Steps and Skips
exercises.summary: Left hand alternates steps and skips in D position.
exercises.goal: Identify and play steps vs. skips in bass D position.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: D Bass Song
exercises.summary: Five-measure melodic bass line in D position.
exercises.goal: Play a musical D-position bass melody with a clear phrase shape.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: G Bass Steps and Skips
exercises.summary: Left hand steps and skips in bass G position.
exercises.goal: Play thirds and skips cleanly in bass G position.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: G Bass Song
exercises.summary: Five-measure melodic bass line in G position.
exercises.goal: Shape a G-position bass melody with even tone and clear phrasing.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: A Minor Bass Skips
exercises.summary: Left hand thirds and skips in the bass A minor position.
exercises.goal: Play thirds in bass A minor position with a clear, dark tone.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: D Position Melody
exercises.summary: Six-measure D-position melody with a full rise and fall.
exercises.goal: Play a complete melodic arc in D position with phrase direction.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: G Position Melody
exercises.summary: Six-measure G-position melody rising to D5 and descending back.
exercises.goal: Play a full-range G-position melody reaching D5 with confidence.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: A Minor Song
exercises.summary: Six-measure A minor melody with a plaintive, flowing character.
exercises.goal: Play a complete A minor phrase with expressive minor-mode character.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: A Minor Bass Song
exercises.summary: Six-measure A minor melody in bass clef.
exercises.goal: Shape a complete A minor bass melody with tone and phrasing.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Level 2B Capstone
exercises.summary: Six-measure D-position capstone combining steps, skips, and varied note values.
exercises.goal: Demonstrate D-position fluency with accurate F-sharp, clear steps and skips, and musical phrase shape.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.
